title: erodium × keichium
intro: Erodium × keichium, also known as the keith's heron's bill, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the geranium family and is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that make it effective in treating wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Erodium × keichium include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
